title: General Security Best Practices
body: Always use TLS 1.3 for internal communications. Rotate API keys every 90 days. Review access logs weekly.

title: Incident Response Protocol
body:
1. Identify and contain the breach.
2. Escalate to SOC lead.
3. Preserve forensic evidence.
4. Notify affected parties within 24 hours.
